sectors.news_driver: Volkswagen's potential job cuts and plant closures

stocks.name: Tata Motors
stocks.reason: Volkswagen's job cuts -> reduced global auto demand -> lower exports for Tata Motors

stocks.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
stocks.reason: Volkswagen's plant closures -> increased competition for Indian auto players -> lower market share for M&M

sectors.news_driver: Power Grid of India's increased borrowing limit

stocks.name: Power Grid Corporation of India
stocks.reason: Increased borrowing limit -> higher investment in power transmission infrastructure -> increased revenue for Power Grid

sectors.news_driver: PNB's focus on Retail, Agriculture, MSME advances

stocks.name: Punjab National Bank
stocks.reason: Focus on Retail, Agriculture, MSME advances -> higher CASA deposits -> improved profitability for PNB

sectors.news_driver: Godrej and Blue Star's premium push

stocks.name: Godrej Consumer Products
